title: NFT Gallery Viewer
description: Drop-in React component that renders a full NFT gallery for any wallet using GoldRush Kit's NFTWalletCollectionView — zero custom UI needed, works across all EVM chains.
useCase: Add a fully styled NFT gallery to any React/Next.js app in under 10 lines — no custom UI required, just drop in the GoldRush Kit component.

keyParams.walletAddress: 0x wallet address whose NFTs to display
keyParams.apikey: GoldRush API key passed to GoldRushProvider
